critical_warnings_for_next_session: RUN THE REBOOT LIFECYCLE FIRST: confirm pkg_hash s4-d1f7a3 matches meta/project_knowledge_graph.json, npm test expect 210 passing.

CONTENT GENERATION STAYS HARD-GATED until M2 (P4+P5+P6) is VERIFIED — do NOT author any level/chapter content in P4. All S4.x fixtures are in-code unit scaffolding (see AgentArchetypes.test.ts buildLevel) or test/fixtures/ — keep it that way.

THE AXIOM is P4's ground truth, not its parameter (dm-0020/dm-0024): S4.2's solvability audit reads world.jumpLock — never re-implements the lock, never counts jumps by parsing tapes, and no maxJumps-like knob may exist in eval config (dm-0011).

ENGINE ASSEMBLY: use CANONICAL_PIPELINE exported from src/eval/AgentHarness.ts (normative order lifecycle → entityKinematics → playerControl → playerPhysics → sensors → hazardsAndGoal, dm-0021). Hand-assembling a different order is a different simulation.

ONE-WAY DEPENDENCY (dm-0022, scan-enforced by EvalIsolation.test.ts): nothing under src/{core,systems,components,entities,schema} may import from src/eval/. The math whitelist now covers src/eval/ too (allowed: sqrt/min/max/abs/floor/ceil/trunc; no Math.random) — also scan-enforced.

AGENT DETERMINISM (dm-0024): agents thread their OWN RNG stream via AgentMemory (agentStreamSeed derivation); state.rng belongs to the sim alone. Any new agent/solver must preserve live≡replay bit-equality — it is an acceptance test, keep it that way in S4.2+.

REPLAY TAPES (dm-0023): ReplayTape v1 stores the NORMALIZED uint32 seed (may differ from a raw caller seed); frames[i] drove tick i+1; a tape references levelId, it does not embed the level. ARCHETYPES params are FROZEN — editing them invalidates every recorded tape (ledger a decision if ever needed).

Golden canonical sha256 c0ec3b1f... (LevelRoundTrip) still anchored. Schema locks dm-0009..dm-0015 in force. Save/progress persistence owned by P9/REQ-171; replay-tape serialization now OWNED (dm-0023) — do not redefine it in P8/P9.
Do NOT change FIXED_STEP_SECONDS (dm-0003); never mutate GameState in place (dm-0004).
The private npm mirror npm.shootsta.com is broken; .npmrc pins registry.npmjs.org — don't remove it.
